rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 7/10 and surface the same three strengths and the same three concerns, differing only in wording (e.g., 'diverse programming languages' vs 'multiple programming languages', 'work on complex projects' vs 'technical leadership'). No concern, score change, or shifted reasoning keys off the candidate's caregiving career gap or its duration — there is no reference to age, availability, commitment, or the gap at all. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
